name: Srj Technologies Group Plc
analysis: SRJ has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 42% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$0.0150, stop A$0.0099, target A$0.0180 (0.59:1) — then trail it.
